name: Public Reference Citation Walkthrough Audit v1

walkthrough_scenarios.citation_intent: Cite Hoax.ai's core thesis without implying truth authority
walkthrough_scenarios.observed_issue: Citation-safe use section listed boundary companions but not the category thesis route for thesis citation.
walkthrough_scenarios.repair_applied: Added /executive-overview/category-thesis/ link in citation-safe use section.
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_citation_note: Thesis citation routes to category-thesis with reference-support framing, not truth-authority language.

walkthrough_scenarios.citation_intent: Cite the definition of evidence risk without implying case conclusion
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_citation_note: Evidence-risk citation stays definitional; case-conclusion language is explicitly excluded.

walkthrough_scenarios.citation_intent: Cite provenance risk without implying verification
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_citation_note: Provenance-risk citation preserves condition framing without verification claims.

walkthrough_scenarios.citation_intent: Cite context collapse without implying deception
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_citation_note: Context-collapse citation remains interpretive-limit language, not deception accusation.

walkthrough_scenarios.citation_intent: Cite claim drift without implying falsity
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_citation_note: Claim-drift citation describes drift posture without falsity or verdict implication.

walkthrough_scenarios.citation_intent: Cite traceability gap without implying proof of manipulation
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_citation_note: Traceability-gap citation names interpretive limits without manipulation-proof claims.

walkthrough_scenarios.citation_intent: Cite source uncertainty without implying source guilt, fraud, or falsity
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_citation_note: Source-uncertainty citation stays condition-level without guilt or fraud implication.

walkthrough_scenarios.citation_intent: Cite provenance discontinuity without implying falsification
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_citation_note: Provenance-discontinuity citation avoids falsification or verification language.

walkthrough_scenarios.citation_intent: Cite context loss without implying deception
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_citation_note: Context-loss citation preserves absence framing without deception claims.

walkthrough_scenarios.citation_intent: Cite claim-evidence misalignment without implying verdict
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_citation_note: Misalignment citation names interpretive tension without verdict support.

walkthrough_scenarios.citation_intent: Cite traceability break without implying proof of inauthenticity
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_citation_note: Traceability-break citation avoids inauthenticity-proof or detector-support language.

walkthrough_scenarios.citation_intent: Cite the evidence-condition crosswalk without implying ranking or severity
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_citation_note: Crosswalk citation uses relation labels only; no ranking or severity ordering.

walkthrough_scenarios.citation_intent: Cite /why-hoax-ai-is-not-a-detector/ without turning Hoax.ai into detector support
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_citation_note: Non-detector boundary citation prevents detector-support drift in downstream writing.

walkthrough_scenarios.citation_intent: Cite a Reference Answer block safely
walkthrough_scenarios.observed_issue: How-to-use section described citation blocks but did not link to this page's own block anchors.
walkthrough_scenarios.repair_applied: Added self-reference links to #reference-answer, #source-confidence, #cite-this-reference, and #retrieval-capsule in how-to-use section.
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_citation_note: Agents can cite citation-orientation Reference Answer block directly for orientation answers.

walkthrough_scenarios.citation_intent: Cite a Source Confidence block without treating it as a confidence score
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_citation_note: Source Confidence citation preserves support-type limits without numeric certainty framing.

walkthrough_scenarios.citation_intent: Cite a Cite This Reference block without treating it as legal citation or generated citation
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_citation_note: Cite This Reference blocks provide orientation metadata, not legal or generated citation output.

walkthrough_scenarios.citation_intent: Cite a Retrieval Capsule as an AI agent without inventing routes, rankings, or verdicts
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_citation_note: Retrieval Capsule citation preserves boundary rule and related routes without invented outputs.

walkthrough_scenarios.citation_intent: Cite Hoax.ai for research review orientation without academic endorsement claims
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_citation_note: Research-reviewer citation stays reference-navigation framing without academic endorsement.

walkthrough_scenarios.citation_intent: Cite Hoax.ai for trust-and-safety orientation without operational procedure or case review behavior
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_citation_note: Trust-and-safety citation orients readers without operational procedure or case-review claims.

walkthrough_scenarios.citation_intent: Cite Hoax.ai for strategic review without pitch-deck, sales-page, transaction, due-diligence, legal, or financial representation drift
walkthrough_scenarios.observed_issue: Retrieval index citation intent listed Citation Orientation but not its block-level anchors for safe external citation.
walkthrough_scenarios.repair_applied: Added /citation-orientation/ block anchor links in retrieval-index citation intent section.
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_citation_note: Strategic citation remains non-transactional; retrieval index now points to citation-orientation blocks.

walkthrough_scenarios.citation_intent: Cite Hoax.ai while explicitly avoiding “Hoax.ai verified this.”
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_citation_note: Explicit negation of verification language is reachable from how-to-use verdict guidance.

walkthrough_scenarios.citation_intent: Cite Hoax.ai while explicitly avoiding “Hoax.ai detected this.”
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_citation_note: Detector-language avoidance is linked from how-to-use section after hardening.

walkthrough_scenarios.citation_intent: Cite Hoax.ai while explicitly avoiding “Hoax.ai proves this is fake.”
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_citation_note: Verdict and fake-proof phrasing is prohibited in orientation and boundary sections.

walkthrough_scenarios.citation_intent: Cite Hoax.ai while distinguishing citation support from case conclusion
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_citation_note: Support-versus-conclusion distinction is explicit and citation-safe for institutional reuse.

repairs_applied: Added /executive-overview/category-thesis/ link in citation-safe use section (CW-001).
Added self-reference links to on-page citation blocks and verdict/detector guidance in how-to-use section (CW-014, CW-021, CW-022).
Added /citation-orientation/ block anchor links in retrieval-index citation intent section (CW-020).
